task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'soc_tier1' role and its inheritance from the 'user' role.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Splunk role creation or edit screen for 'soc_tier1' showing 'user' selected in the inherited roles section, or the main Roles list showing 'soc_tier1' inheriting from 'user'.

task_completion.description: Verify 'soc_tier1' is restricted to the correct indexes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Indexes tab in the 'soc_tier1' role settings showing 'security_logs' and 'web_logs' as the only explicitly included/selected indexes.

task_completion.description: Verify 'soc_tier1' search limits are configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Resources or Search limits tab for 'soc_tier1' showing the concurrent search jobs limit (Standard search limit) set to 2 and the maximum search time window set to 604800.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'soc_tier2' role and its inheritance from 'soc_tier1'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Splunk role creation or edit screen for 'soc_tier2' showing 'soc_tier1' selected in the inherited roles section, or the main Roles list showing 'soc_tier2' inheriting from 'soc_tier1'.

task_completion.description: Verify 'soc_tier2' search limits are configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Resources or Search limits tab for 'soc_tier2' showing the concurrent search jobs limit (Standard search limit) set to 6 and the maximum search time window set to 0.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Splunk Web UI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Splunk Enterprise interface at localhost:8000.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the GUI by editing configuration files directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows or text editors (like nano or vim) open editing Splunk .conf files (e.g., authorize.conf).

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually interacted with the configuration forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should capture the agent interacting with the role configuration forms, such as typing names, selecting tabs, checking boxes, or clicking the Save button.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Role 1: Name is 'soc_tier1', inherits from 'user', allowed indexes are exactly 'security_logs' and 'web_logs', concurrent jobs quota is 2, time window is 604800 seconds. Role 2: Name is 'soc_tier2', inherits from 'soc_tier1', concurrent jobs quota is 6, time window is 0 seconds.
